ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clear and fully legible. Contains standard ICC COO format with bilingual (English/Swedish) field labels.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clear and fully legible. 2 pages. Contains complete commercial invoice with all standard fields.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The remarks field contains '4700169830' and 'Invoice No. 9430002357' — neither constitutes an LC reference. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar is present.

locations_found: Invoice page 1 header: 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB'
Invoice page 1 footer: 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB, Customer Service, Gothenburg, Sweden'
Invoice page 2 header: 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB'
Invoice page 2 footer: 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB Customer Service Goteborg, Sweden'

pairing_validation.motivation: All three pairing criteria are met: (1) Certificate references Invoice No. 9430002357, which matches the invoice's Invoice No. 9430002357. (2) Certificate consignor 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB' is identifiable in the invoice header. (3) Certificate consignee 'Nouryon Middle East FZE' is identifiable in the invoice Bill To field.

candidates.normalized_text: attn: bdp global logistics, jebel ali free zone, dubai

candidates.normalized_text: 80 drum amphomer 200 lbs 90.72 kg fibre drum - us

candidates.normalized_text: bu surface chemistry, po box 262203, dubai, united arab emirates

candidates.raw_text: Attn: BDP Global Logistics, Jebel Ali Free Zone, DUBAI, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES
candidates.normalized_text: attn: bdp global logistics, jebel ali free zone, dubai, united arab emirates

consignor.certificate_value: Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB, BOX 47067, 402 58, GOTHENBURG, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB, BOX 47067, 402 58 Goteborg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice files and pages
comparison_steps.details: Certificate consignor 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB' found exactly in invoice header on page 1 ('Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB'), page 1 footer ('Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB, Customer Service, Gothenburg, Sweden'), page 2 header ('Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB'), and page 2 footer ('Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB Customer Service Goteborg, Sweden'). The invoice is issued by this exact company. No need to proceed to 4.1.3.1-4.1.3.6.
Certificate consignor country: 'Sweden'. Invoice issuer address: 'Sweden'. Exact match after normalization.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice header

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB' with address 'BOX 47067, 402 58, GOTHENBURG, Sweden'. The invoice is issued by 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB' at 'BOX 47067, 402 58 Goteborg, Sweden'. The company name is an exact match. The address differs only in 'GOTHENBURG' vs 'Goteborg' (same city, Swedish vs English name) which is a minor formatting variation. Country is 'Sweden' in both documents. MATCH per 4.1.0 and 4.1.4.
consignor.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB' återfinns exakt i fakturans sidhuvud som fakturautställare. Land 'Sweden' överensstämmer. MATCH enligt regel 4.1.0 och 4.1.4.

consignee.certificate_value: Nouryon Middle East FZE, Attn: BDP Global Logistics, Jebel Ali Free Zone, DUBAI, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES
consignee.invoice_value: Bill To: Nouryon Middle East FZE, BU Surface Chemistry, PO Box 262203, DUBAI, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES / Ship To: Nouryon Middle East FZE, Attn: BDP Global Logistics, Jebel Ali Free Zone, DUBAI, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice has explicit 'Bill To' field with 'Nouryon Middle East FZE, BU Surface Chemistry, PO Box 262203, DUBAI, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES'.

comparison_steps.description: Verify certificate consignee name against invoice Bill To
comparison_steps.details: Certificate consignee: 'Nouryon Middle East FZE'. Invoice Bill To: 'Nouryon Middle East FZE'. Exact match after normalization of case.
Certificate consignee country: 'UNITED ARAB EMIRATES'. Invoice Bill To country: 'UNITED ARAB EMIRATES'. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Prioritetsordning – Bill To field identified as primary
Namnverifiering – exact match of consignee name in Bill To field
Adressskillnad – certificate has 'Jebel Ali Free Zone' (Ship To address) while Bill To has 'PO Box 262203'; different addresses for same company not ground for MISMATCH per 4.2.4

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Nouryon Middle East FZE' in 'UNITED ARAB EMIRATES'. Invoice Bill To (primary billing field per 4.2.0.2) is 'Nouryon Middle East FZE' in 'UNITED ARAB EMIRATES'. Company name is an exact match. Country is an exact match. The certificate address ('Attn: BDP Global Logistics, Jebel Ali Free Zone, DUBAI') matches the invoice Ship To field exactly. The Bill To address differs (PO Box 262203 vs Jebel Ali Free Zone) but per rule 4.2.4, address differences for the same company do not constitute MISMATCH — the company name and country are the determining factors. MATCH.
consignee.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Nouryon Middle East FZE' återfinns exakt i fakturans Bill To-fält. Land 'United Arab Emirates' överensstämmer. Adressskillnader (PO Box vs Jebel Ali Free Zone) avser samma företag och påverkar inte bedömningen enligt regel 4.2.4. MATCH.

goods_description.certificate_value:
80 DRUM
80 DRUM AMPHOMER 200 LBS 90.72 KG FIBRE DRUM - US

comparison_steps.description: Check if article numbers are specified in certificate
comparison_steps.details: No specific article numbers are given in the certificate goods description field. The certificate describes goods by product name and packaging specification.

Certificate identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning: 'AMPHOMER'. This is the product name that uniquely identifies the goods. Invoice Material Description: 'AMPHOMER'. Exact match after case normalization. Additional specification '200 LBS ~ 90.72 KG FIBRE DRUM' in the invoice corresponds to '200 LBS 90.72 KG FIBRE DRUM' in the certificate (the '~' symbol is non-identity-bearing). The certificate also states '80 DRUM' and the invoice states 'No of Packages 80', confirming package count. The suffix '- US' in the certificate is a non-identity-bearing origin indicator (verified separately in 4.5).

rules_applied.description: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'AMPHOMER' identified exactly in both documents
Non-identity-bearing additions ('80 DRUM', '- US', '~') do not affect product identity

goods_description.debug_explanation: The certificate goods description contains 'AMPHOMER' as the identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning. The invoice item 10 Material Description is 'AMPHOMER / 200 LBS ~ 90.72 KG FIBRE DRUM'. The product name 'AMPHOMER' matches exactly. The packaging specification '200 LBS 90.72 KG FIBRE DRUM' is present in both documents. The '~' in the invoice and '- US' suffix in the certificate are non-identity-bearing per 4.3.4. MATCH.
goods_description.motivation: Certifikatets varubeskrivning 'AMPHOMER 200 LBS 90.72 KG FIBRE DRUM' kan identifieras exakt i fakturans Material Description 'AMPHOMER 200 LBS ~ 90.72 KG FIBRE DRUM'. Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'AMPHOMER' matchar. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the quantity in box 7 as the verification basis
comparison_steps.details: Certificate box 7 contains '7801.920 G.W.' — this is the verification basis per 4.4.2.1. The value is 7801.920 with category G.W. (Gross Weight).
Certificate specifies 'G.W.' (Gross Weight). However, the certificate does not explicitly state the unit (KG or MT). Per 4.4.4, we check if the invoice confirms the same numeric value with a unit.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the numeric value 7801.920 in the invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice states 'Gross Weight 7.801,920 KG'. The numeric value is 7801.920 (using European decimal notation: '7.801,920' where '.' is thousands separator and ',' is decimal separator). After normalization of thousands separator per 4.4.3.3: 7801.920. This matches certificate value 7801.920 exactly. Weight category 'Gross Weight' matches 'G.W.'. Invoice provides the unit KG.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 value '7801.920 G.W.' identified as verification basis
Weight category G.W. specified in certificate; unit not explicitly stated in certificate but confirmed by invoice as KG
Numeric value 7801.920 identified in invoice Gross Weight field
Thousands separator normalization applied to invoice value '7.801,920' → 7801.920
Certificate G.W. without explicit unit; invoice confirms same value with KG unit and no contradicting alternative → MATCH per 4.4.2.2 point 2-like reasoning

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '7801.920 G.W.' — numeric value 7801.920 with Gross Weight category but without explicit unit. Invoice states 'Gross Weight 7.801,920 KG' (European notation: dot as thousands separator, comma as decimal separator → 7801.920 KG). After thousands separator normalization per 4.4.3.3, the values are identical: 7801.920. The weight category 'G.W.' matches 'Gross Weight'. The certificate lacks an explicit unit (KG/MT), but per 4.4.4 the invoice confirms the same numeric value with unit KG. The invoice also states Net Weight 7.257,600 KG which is a different value — however, the certificate explicitly specifies G.W. so there is no ambiguity about which weight category is being verified. The numeric values match exactly. MATCH.
quantity.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet '7801.920 G.W.' kan identifieras i fakturans Gross Weight-fält '7.801,920 KG' efter normalisering av tusentalsavskiljare. Numeriskt värde och viktkategori överensstämmer exakt. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate lacks explicit unit — should this trigger MANUAL_REVIEW per 4.4.4?
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per 4.4.2.2: the certificate states G.W. (identifying weight category). The invoice confirms the same numeric value 7801.920 with unit KG. The certificate also contains only one weight value in box 7. Since the invoice provides the unit and the values match, and no contradicting alternate value exists for GW, this qualifies as verifiable. Additionally, the '90.72 KG' per drum specification in the goods description implies KG is the operative unit. MATCH is appropriate.

comparison_steps.details: Invoice contains explicit field 'Country of Origin' with value 'United States' on page 1, item 10.
Certificate: 'UNITED STATES'. Invoice: 'United States'. After case normalization: 'united states' = 'united states'. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Explicit Country of Origin field found in invoice

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'UNITED STATES'. Invoice item 10 explicitly states 'Country of Origin United States'. After case normalization both are 'united states'. Single origin in both documents, no mixed origins. Exact match. MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'UNITED STATES' kan identifieras exakt i fakturans fält 'Country of Origin United States'. MATCH.

evidence_inventory.raw_text: 80 DRUM AMPHOMER 200 LBS 90.72 KG FIBRE DRUM - US

rule_evaluation_log.details: No LC reference found in certificate. Standard verification applies.
Document A is certificate (COO), Document B is invoice. Certificate references Invoice No. 9430002357 which matches invoice. Single certificate, single invoice. Clear pairing.
All three criteria met: invoice number match, consignor identifiable, consignee identifiable.
Consignor 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB' found in invoice header, footer, and issuer identification on all pages.
Bill To field identified with 'Nouryon Middle East FZE'.
Exact name match in Bill To field.
United Arab Emirates = United Arab Emirates
Certificate address (Jebel Ali Free Zone) differs from Bill To address (PO Box 262203) but same company name and country. Address difference not MISMATCH per 4.2.4.
Suffixes '- US' and prefix '80 DRUM' are non-identity-bearing.
Box 7 contains '7801.920 G.W.' as the verification basis.
7801.920 identified in invoice Gross Weight 7.801,920 KG after thousands separator normalization.
Invoice '7.801,920' normalized by treating '.' as thousands separator and ',' as decimal: 7801.920. Matches certificate 7801.920.
Explicit 'Country of Origin United States' field in invoice.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändare (Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB, Sweden), mottagare (Nouryon Middle East FZE, UAE), varubeskrivning (Amphomer), kvantitet (7801,920 kg bruttovikt) och ursprungsland (United States) kan alla verifieras. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
notes: Certificate quantity field (box 7) states G.W. without explicit unit (KG/MT), but the invoice confirms the exact same numeric value as Gross Weight with unit KG. No ambiguity exists.
Certificate invoice reference (9430002357) and order reference (4700169830) both match the invoice exactly.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB, BOX 47067, 402 58, GOTHENBURG, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB, BOX 47067, 402 58 Goteborg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur – consignor identifierad i fakturans sidhuvud
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB' återfinns exakt i fakturans sidhuvud och sidfot. Land 'Sweden' matchar i båda dokumenten. Adressskillnaden 'GOTHENBURG' vs 'Goteborg' avser samma stad och utgör inte en avvikelse.

sections.certificate_value: Nouryon Middle East FZE, Attn: BDP Global Logistics, Jebel Ali Free Zone, DUBAI, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES
sections.invoice_value: Bill To: Nouryon Middle East FZE, BU Surface Chemistry, PO Box 262203, DUBAI, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES
sections.rule_applied: Namnverifiering mot Bill To-fält; adressskillnad ej grund för MISMATCH
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Nouryon Middle East FZE' återfinns exakt i fakturans Bill To-fält. Land 'United Arab Emirates' matchar. Certifikatets adress (Jebel Ali Free Zone) matchar fakturans Ship To-fält exakt. Skillnaden mot Bill To-adressen (PO Box 262203) avser samma företag med olika kontorsadresser och utgör ej MISMATCH.

sections.certificate_value: 80 DRUM AMPHOMER 200 LBS 90.72 KG FIBRE DRUM - US
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning – identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'AMPHOMER' identifierad exakt
sections.motivation: Produktnamnet 'AMPHOMER' utgör den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen och matchar exakt. Förpackningsspecifikation '200 LBS 90.72 KG FIBRE DRUM' återfinns i båda dokumenten. Prefix '80 DRUM' och suffix '- US' i certifikatet är icke-identitetsbärande tillägg.

Certifikatets kvantitet 7801.920 G.W. matchar fakturans Gross Weight 7.801,920 KG exakt efter normalisering av tusentalsavskiljare (punkt som tusentalsavskiljare i europeisk notation). Viktkategori 'G.W.' = 'Gross Weight'.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt matchning efter normalisering av versaler/gemener
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'UNITED STATES' matchar fakturans explicit angivna 'Country of Origin United States' exakt efter normalisering.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet, ursprungsland) ger MATCH. Certifikatets uppgifter kan verifieras mot fakturan utan avvikelser. Rekommendation: automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.notes: All checkpoints MATCH with confidence ≥ 0.97. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW on any checkpoint. comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent with all checkpoints being MATCH. workflow_recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with comparison_result IDENTICAL.
